body.title: [triage] Unified per-device log home (~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/)
body.intention: I intend that every rack device's logs land in one canonical per-device home, split by level (info/warn/debug), so a device's comm feeds and web page have a single place to read from.
body.description:
Akien (2026-06-25): ALL logs for EVERYTHING go in /home/akien/.unseen_university/logs, BY DEVICE — and this isn't built yet. The comm-channel feeds info/warn/debug (T-uu-readfeed) and the shim-owned web feed buttons (T-device-web-feed-channel-buttons) have nothing to read until this exists. Build the unified per-device log hierarchy: ~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/ with separate info/warn/debug streams per device, so every device logs to one canonical, greppable, per-level home.

Reconcile the conflict: CLAUDE.md currently names datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ as THE log hierarchy, but Akien's canonical location is ~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/. Resolve which is canonical (Akien: the latter) and update CLAUDE.md + any writers pointing at the old root.

**Affected files:** logging setup (BaseDevice/shim log config), CLAUDE.md (datacenter_logs rule), any device writing to datacenter_logs/ or a flat ~/.unseen_university/logs file; new per-device/per-level routing.
**Design rules:** log every state change + interface crossing; never a flat root log file; flat-file (no DB) for logs; reconcile the datacenter_logs vs ~/.unseen_university/logs rule.
**Scope boundary:** IN — the unified per-device log home + info/warn/debug per-level split + CLAUDE.md reconciliation. OUT — the readfeed CLI reader and the web feed buttons (separate tickets that CONSUME this).
**Test plan:** a device emits an info, a warn, and a debug record; assert each lands under ~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/ in the right per-level stream; assert no device writes to a flat root log file.
**Completion criteria:** every device's logs route to ~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/ split by info/warn/debug; CLAUDE.md log-home rule reconciled to this location; a test proves per-level routing for >=1 device.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
